{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.circuit_breaker_type",
      "operator": "==",

      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Circuit breakers shall be vacuum type, withdrawable on truck mechanism."
    },
    {

      "operator": "==",

    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.truck_test_position",

      "quote": "Breaker truck shall have test, connected, and disconnected positions with mechanical interlocks."
    },
    {

      "quote": "Breaker truck shall have test, connected, and disconnected positions with mechanical interlocks."

    {

    {

    }
  ]
}
